summary: Target the semantic AI panel section in the packaged unconfigured-state probe instead of an earlier control with the same accessible label.

decisions.decision: Select `section[aria-label="AI"]` for the unconfigured workbench assertion rather than the first arbitrary element carrying the shared AI label.
decisions.rationale: The exact adc66b9 Sandbox run proved the corrected security sentence still evaluated false because the broad selector matched an earlier AI navigation control. The production unconfigured conversation is a semantic section with the same accessible label; constraining the element type binds the text and button assertions to that panel.

testEvidence.criterion: The actual injected probe must ignore an earlier AI-labeled control and inspect the semantic AI panel containing production guidance and no Send button.
testEvidence.test: Execute M4_DOM_SCRIPTS.aiUnconfigured against a DOM fixture whose broad AI selector resolves to a decoy control and whose section selector resolves to the current production messages.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts -t "recognizes the current unconfigured-AI security guidance" --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1
red.outcome: RED: the broad selector read the earlier control and returned guidanceVisible false with sendCount zero.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/m4-packaged-walkthrough.test.ts -t "recognizes the current unconfigured-AI security guidance" --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1
green.outcome: GREEN: the semantic section selector ignored the decoy and returned guidanceVisible true with sendCount zero.

nearMisses.sought: Exact clean packaged M4 walkthrough on candidate adc66b9
nearMisses.confirmation: Clean build, WebView2 startup including the corrected port mirror, cube render/export, MCP walkthrough, process inspection, and N-2-disabled boundary passed. M4 then failed at the unconfigured guidance assertion because its broad selector targeted the earlier AI control; no later M4 assertions ran. Host cleanup removed the exact Sandbox session and staging directory.

questions: No owner decision is required. Do not repeat the clean Sandbox lane until this selector correction passes bounded local review.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
